title: Umami Enchilada Delight
description: A light and crowd-pleasing Thai dish featuring an umami-rich enchilada sauce, made nut-free-friendly for a wider audience.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine chickpea flour and water to form a smooth batter. Mix until there are no lumps.
Heat vegetable oil or coconut oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Pour the batter into the pan and spread it out evenly using a spatula.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, flipping once, until golden brown. Set aside to cool slightly.
In another skillet, sauté garlic and onion with red curry paste until fragrant. Stir in umami flavoring, paprika, cumin powder, salt, and sugar.
Add cooked chickpea flour cakes to the skillet. Mix well to coat all sides with sauce. Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes or until fully heated through.
Serve hot over rice or as a side dish. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
